metadata.title: Docxer
metadata.description: Import Word files easily. Adds a preview mode for .docx files and the ability to convert them to markdown (.md) files.

regex.source: .setDesc("Delete source file after pressing the conversion button.")
.setDesc("Import comments from docx files using reference links. Comments will be placed at the end of the markdown file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用引用链接从 docx 文件导入注释。注释将放置在标记文件的末尾.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Settings related to attachments extracted during file conversion.")
regex.target: .setDesc("与文件转换过程中提取的附件相关的设置.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Fallback name if the attachment file has no alt text or is written using only invalid characters.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果附件文件没有alt文本或仅使用无效字符编写，则为备用名称.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the destination for attachments extracted during file conversion.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定在文件转换期间提取的附件的目标.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the name of the folder where attachments will be extracted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定将提取附件的文件夹的名称.")

regex.source: .innerText = "This is a preview. To edit, convert it to markdown."
regex.target: .innerText = "这是预览。要编辑，请将其转换为markdown."
.setName("将图像的描述文本作为文件名")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use the alt text of the image as the filename. If the alt text is empty, the fallback name will be used.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将图像的描述文本用作文件名。如果描述文本为空，则将使用备用名称")
"在当前文件夹下的子文件夹中"
